name: Consumable
description: A versatile behavior that enables objects to be collected by players, providing various power-ups, resources, or inventory items. Players can collect items either automatically on contact or by pressing a key when near the object.
documentation:
## Consumable
Create collectible items that grant effects to the player.

### Inventory Type
- **Consumable** - Standard pickup item
- **Throwable** - Can be thrown after pickup
- **Weapon** - Equippable weapon
- **Weapon Ammo** - Ammunition for weapons

### Effects
- **Health/Shield/Ammo Amount** - Restore resources
- **Point/Money Amount** - Add score or currency
- **Speed/Jump Amount** - Temporary movement boosts
- **Scale Amount** - Resize the character
- **Time Amount** - Add time to countdown

### Behavior
- **Consumable Type** - Instant (auto-collect) or Press E
- **Collision Type** - With Player, Object, or Enemy
- **Disposable** - Item disappears after use
- **Can Reappear** - Item respawns after collection
- **UI Image** - Icon shown in player inventory

### Tips
- Use duration fields for temporary speed/jump boosts
- Combine with Visual Effect for pickup particles
author: stemstudio

inventoryType.name: Inventory Type
inventoryType.description: Determines how the item behaves in the player's inventory. Consumable is a standard pickup, Throwable can be thrown, Weapon is equippable, and Weapon Ammo provides ammunition.

pointAmount.description: Number of score points awarded to the player when this item is collected.

timeAmount.description: Amount of time in seconds added to a countdown timer when this item is collected.

healthAmount.description: Amount of health points restored to the player when this item is collected.

ammoAmount.description: Amount of ammunition added to the player's weapon when this item is collected.

shieldAmount.description: Amount of shield points granted to the player when this item is collected. Shield absorbs damage before health.

moneyAmount.description: Amount of in-game currency awarded to the player when this item is collected.

speedAmount.description: Movement speed boost applied to the player when this item is collected. Use with timeForEffect_speed to make it temporary.

scaleAmount.description: Scale multiplier applied to the player character when this item is collected. Values greater than 1 enlarge, less than 1 shrink.

jumpAmount.description: Jump height boost applied to the player when this item is collected. Use with timeForEffect_jump to make it temporary.

timeForEffect_jump.description: Duration in seconds for the jump boost effect. After this time, the player's jump height returns to normal.

timeToShowAgain.description: Time in seconds before the item respawns after being collected. Only applies when Can Reappear is enabled.

timeForEffect_speed.description: Duration in seconds for the speed boost effect. After this time, the player's movement speed returns to normal.

useBoundingBoxes.description: When set, uses bounding box collision detection instead of physics-based collision for triggering item collection.

uiImage.description: Icon image displayed in the player's inventory UI to represent this item.

consumableType.name: Consumable Type
consumableType.description: Determines how the player collects this item. Instant collects automatically on contact, Press E requires the player to press a key when nearby.

collisionType.name: Collision Type
collisionType.description: Specifies which entity type can collect this item. With Player limits collection to the player character, With Object to any collidable object, and With Enemy to enemy NPCs.

disposable.name: Disposable
disposable.description: When enabled, the item disappears from the scene after being collected.

canReappear.name: Can Reappear
canReappear.description: When enabled, the item respawns after being collected, with the delay set by timeToShowAgain.
